description: Story A (shared preamble). R5 cross-cutting half -- growth-mindset planning register. Add to the preamble plan-register rules. Mirror + re-stamp + parity.
acceptance_criteria: Wherever a generated plan describes revising/adjusting, an adversarial reviewer finds it framed as evidence-driven course-correction, with zero instances framed as failure or deficit.
The framing scans to zero process-method terms; the dispatched output parses clean.
